channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump appoints housing official as acting director of national intelligence
item.description: Bill Pulte has shown a willingness to target the president's perceived adversaries.

item.title: Doctors checked Biden just after Trump debate as Jill Biden feared he had a stroke
item.description: The Biden administration previously said doctors examined the president "days" after the debate, not immediately. The former first lady r...

item.title: Trump signs AI safety order encouraging voluntary model reviews
item.description: The order requests AI companies to voluntarily submit their most powerful models for government testing up to 30 days before public release.

item.title: Five strategies to reduce everyday exposure to 'forever chemicals'
item.description: Mara Hoplamazian has spent years covering PFAS. Here is what they have learned about limiting everyday exposure to these substances.
